queue_basis.selected_gap: Runtime enforcement of the handoff-promotion schema was unresolved.

observed: M-001 is completed and its handoff is not itself an active queue item.
The prior continuity claim identified runtime validation as unresolved.
inferred: Schema shape alone is insufficient unless executable state, owner acceptance, and exact handoff bytes are checked together.
proposed: Require this validator before any handoff-derived item is represented as queued, active, or verified.
superseded: Treating schema-valid structure without digest and owner-acceptance checks as sufficient promotion authority.
unresolved: No canonical M-002 queue record has been authorized or added.
The validator is not yet wired into a repository-wide queue gate.
